items.title: XLV is A $41 Billion Defensive Healthcare Play That Looks Good Until You Compare To The S&P 500
items.description: Healthcare isn’t going anywhere. An aging population, chronic disease management, and breakthrough treatments ensure this sector remains essential regardless of market conditions. Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (NYSEARCA:XLV) offers concentrated exposure to this defensive sector, but with concentration comes tradeoffs investors must understand before allocating capital.
